description_long: This object is a large, stylized cross-section of a fish, resembling a thick sushi steak or sashimi cut, displayed on a round wooden board. The exterior features a dark blue-green fish skin with subtle speckling and a gradient that transitions to a lighter underbelly. The cut face reveals a vibrant orange-pink flesh with intricate white marbling, mimicking the fatty layers of salmon or a similar fish. The tail, dorsal, and pectoral fins are still attached, adding to the realism and visual interest. The wooden base has a circular shape with a natural wood grain texture, providing a rustic presentation. No garnishes, sauces, or additional elements are present, emphasizing the freshness and quality of the fish itself.
description: A thick, cross-sectioned fish steak with blue-green skin and orange marbled flesh, presented on a round wooden board. The tail and fins remain attached, highlighting its freshness and visual appeal.
description_view_0: The back of the fish steak, showing the dark blue-green skin, tail, and dorsal fin, with the wooden board visible beneath.
description_view_1: A side angle revealing the cut face of the fish with orange marbled flesh, the attached fins, and the wooden board.
description_view_2: A direct view of the cut face, displaying the vibrant orange-pink flesh and white marbling, with the wooden board as a base.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the fish, showing the skin, tail, and fins, with no view of the cut face.
